goal: Add a safe local Git snapshot workflow for this repository so the user can quickly save current work, list recoverable snapshots, and restore a prior local state without relying on ad hoc reset commands.
constraints: Prefer additive tooling and documentation; do not rewrite repository history.
Snapshot creation must preserve the current working tree after saving a recoverable copy.
Restore tooling must create a fresh safety backup before any destructive action.
Keep the workflow Windows-friendly and usable from the existing repository package scripts.
deliverables: PowerShell script to create a local snapshot of HEAD plus current working tree.
PowerShell script to list recent local snapshots and restore references.
PowerShell script to restore a chosen local snapshot with an automatic safety backup.
package.json command entries for the new workflow.
A short Chinese developer guide explaining when and how to use the workflow.
